headline: J.B. Hunt (JBHT) Stock Looks Fully Priced Despite Fair Value Support
summary: J.B. Hunt Transport Services has delivered an 84.1% return over the past year, yet its valuation checks paint a more cautious picture, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate sitting close to the current share price while earnings based multiples flag the stock as expensive. The 84.1% 1 year gain suggests J.B. Hunt Transport Services has rapidly repriced on optimism about its growth and freight market exposure. Expectations for continued volume growth and efficiency...
